channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Kenyan court suspends US Ebola quarantine facility plan
item.description: The plan to send Ebola-exposed US nationals to Kenya, which has no known cases of the virus, has provoked a backlash.

item.title: How the end of the nuclear file could reshape Iran, and the region
item.description: A generation of nuclear ambition shaped the Islamic republic. Its end could undo the damage.

item.title: A visual guide to Ethiopia’s ethnic groups and conflict areas
item.description: Ethiopia has faced near-continuous conflict since 2020, with fighting in Tigray, Oromia and Amhara.

item.title: Gaza parents brave dental dilemma: Costly treatment or food on the table?
item.description: Many Palestinians in Gaza are forgoing expensive dental treatment, at a detriment to their health.

item.title: South Korea’s SK Hynix enters exclusive $1 trillion club
item.description: Chipmaker becomes second South Korean company in history to hit milestone.

item.title: NATO states slam Russia after drone crashes in Romania
item.description: The incident adds to concern that Moscow's war on Ukraine risks spilling over to entangle neighbouring NATO states.

item.title: Netherlands’ World Cup 2026 team preview: Players to watch, group, squad
item.description: The Dutch were unbeaten across their qualifiers and have a outside chance of lifting the trophy for the first time.

item.title: Israel football dispute to ‘heat up’ after protest in Ireland-Qatar match
item.description: Ireland's football match against Qatar was stalled by pro-Palestinian protests over upcoming games against Israel.

item.title: How Indian PM Modi’s efforts to isolate Pakistan ‘backfired’
item.description: Pakistan finds itself in a diplomatic sweet spot, wooed by Trump and China. Indian missteps are to blame, say analysts

item.title: Blue Origin rocket explodes on launch pad during test
item.description: A rocket belonging to Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin exploded during a test at the Florida launch pad Thursday night.

item.title: What’s happening on Iran war day 91 as US, Iran near 60-day deal
item.description: US and Iran near a 60-day MoU aimed at reopening the Hormuz strait with talks slated on nuclear and other differences.

item.title: At least six feared dead after bridge collapses in northern India
item.description: At least six feared dead after bridge collapses in northern India

item.title: Messi to captain Argentina at World Cup as Scaloni plays down injury fears
item.description: Lionel Messi's World Cup role was thrown into doubt by injury, but Argentina quell fears by appointing him captain.

item.title: State of trauma: Israel wrestles with mental aftershocks of war
item.description: Studies and officials report rising PTSD, suicide and social strain in Israel amid sustained conflicts since 2023

item.title: Wembanyama and Spurs force game seven against Thunder in NBA playoffs
item.description: San Antonio rout Oklahoma City 118-91 to keep alive their hopes of reaching the NBA Finals, where New York Knicks await.

item.title: Senegal deny World Cup travel delay is due to coach dispute
item.description: Senegal were stripped of the AFCON title after a mid-game boycott of the final and now face turbulent World Cup start.

item.title: Ethiopia to vote on June 1 as Abiy’s ruling party eyes landslide victory
item.description: Opposition fragmentation and violence in parts of the country could potentially limit voter turnout.

item.title: Mexico backs amendment to annul election results over foreign interference
item.description: Critics say measure risks undermining electoral process and creating new avenues for contesting results.

item.title: Colombia’s voters will decide between ‘two visions for the country’
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Teresa Bo reports from Bogota.

item.title: At least three dead after fire destroys Dallas apartment complex
item.description: A large fire destroyed an apartment complex in Dallas after crews responded to reports of a gas leak.

item.title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket explodes on launchpad in Florida
item.description: The incident is the latest setback for Jeff Bezos’s space venture as it seeks to narrow the gap with Elon Musk’s SpaceX.

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Mass evacuations as Israel expands attacks
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Obaida Hitto brings you the latest from southern Lebanon amidst increasing Israeli attacks.

item.title: Anthropic soars to $965bn valuation, leapfrogging OpenAI
item.description: Claude maker raises $65bn from investors ahead of expected initial public offering.

item.title: US Treasury secretary confirms plans for $250 bill featuring Trump’s face
item.description: Proposed $250 bill would mark the first time a living person has appeared on US currency in more than a century.

item.title: US to designate two Brazilian gangs as ‘terrorist’ organisations
item.description: Trump administration has used crime and drug trafficking to push for greater US military influence across Latin America.
